description: Comprehensive UI/UX improvements to student dashboard including photo management, action menus, student rating system, enhanced KPI cards with better labeling, and new functionality for academic performance tracking, attendance display, and fees management.

userStories.title: Photo Management System
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to manage student photos with options to adjust, upload new, or remove photos so that I can maintain up-to-date student records.
acceptanceCriteria: Edit icon on student image opens photo management modal
Modal displays three options: Adjust photo, Upload new photo, Remove photo
Adjust photo opens photo editor/cropper
Upload new photo allows file selection and upload
Remove photo confirms and clears photo with fallback to placeholder
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Student Actions Menu
userStories.description: As an admin, I want a comprehensive actions menu so that I can quickly perform common student management tasks.
acceptanceCriteria: Primary action button 'Call parent' prominently displayed
Vertical three-dot menu contains: Promote, Generate TC, Progress Card, Move to another class section, Write remark, Mark as alumni, Send reminder, Download/print, Share profile
All menu items are functional and open appropriate modals/actions
Share profile opens messaging interface with student profile link
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Student Rating System
userStories.description: As a teacher/admin, I want to rate students across multiple dimensions so that I can track holistic student development.
acceptanceCriteria: Rating component added to student profile with categories: Behavior, Academics, Extra Curricular
Each category shows visual rating (stars/badge)
Admin can add/edit ratings for each category
Ratings are persisted in database
Overall rating calculated and displayed
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Tab Labels Cleanup
userStories.description: As a user, I want clean tab labels without counts so that the interface is less cluttered.
acceptanceCriteria: Documents tab displays only 'Documents' without count badge
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Overview Tab Improvements
userStories.description: As a user, I want an enhanced overview tab with actionable cards and better labeling so that I can quickly understand student status and take actions.
acceptanceCriteria: 'Performance overview' label changed to 'Overview'
All KPI cards are clickable and navigate to detailed views
'Action needed' section added to show pending tasks/alerts
Basic analytics section added with relevant charts/metrics
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Academics Card Enhancement
userStories.description: As a teacher, I want better academic performance display with clear labeling and status indicators so that I can quickly assess student academic standing.
acceptanceCriteria: 'Overall percentage' label changed to 'Average Academic Percentage'
'Exams' badge replaced with performance status: Very Good, Good, Needs Improvement, Poor, Supervision Needed
Status is color-coded (green for good, yellow for needs improvement, red for poor)
'Download report' button added and functional
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Attendance Card Enhancement
userStories.description: As a teacher, I want improved attendance display with additional metrics so that I can better track student attendance patterns.
acceptanceCriteria: 'Attendance' label changed to 'Average Attendance'
'Total present' label changed to 'Present Days'
'Absent Days' metric added and displayed
'Download report' button added and functional
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Fees Card Logic Update
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to see fees paid when fees are current so that I can positively acknowledge responsible payment behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: Card shows 'Total Fees Paid' when all fees are paid
Card shows 'Outstanding Fees' when fees are due
Logic correctly evaluates payment status
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Fees Reminder Modal
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to send fee reminders with customizable messages so that I can communicate effectively with parents.
acceptanceCriteria: 'Send reminder' button opens modal
Modal displays editable preview message with student/parent details
Message is pre-populated with fee details and amount
User can edit message before sending
'Send' button sends message via configured communication channel
Modal shows confirmation after sending
Typecheck passes
